---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

<!-- Hero -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-badge">Ventura, California</div>
  <h1>Safer Streets for <br>Pedestrians &amp; Cyclists</h1>
  <p>Safe Rec Ventura is a community effort to build better bike and pedestrian infrastructure in Ventura. Explore crash data, share your story, and help us push for change.</p>
  <div class="hero-ctas">
    <a href="get-involved.html" class="btn-hero-outline">Get Involved</a>
    <a href="take-action.html" class="btn-hero-outline">Email a Decision Maker</a>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-wave">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 64" preserveAspectRatio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <path d="M0,40 C240,64 480,16 720,40 C960,64 1200,16 1440,40 L1440,64 L0,64 Z" fill="#084c62"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Stats strip -->
<div class="stats-strip" style="padding-bottom:2.5rem">
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-number">2,351+</span><span class="stat-label">Crash Records</span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-number">1,230+</span><span class="stat-label">Bike Crashes</span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-number">1,122+</span><span class="stat-label">Pedestrian Crashes</span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-number">Ventura County</span><span class="stat-label">Coverage Area</span></div>
  <div class="strip-wave">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 1440 40" preserveAspectRatio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <path d="M0,20 C360,40 720,0 1080,20 C1260,30 1380,24 1440,20 L1440,40 L0,40 Z" fill="#f5f0e6"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>
<p style="text-align:center;font-size:0.82em;color:#4a6374;margin-top:0.5rem">Data covers 1/1/2020 – 3/31/2026</p>
```



# Our Current Focus: Protect PCH

We launched [Protect PCH]() in honor of our friends Kellie Standish, Colby Tucker, and everyone whose lives have been forever changed by preventable tragedies on Ventura County's Pacific Coast Highway.

PCH should be safe for everyone. We are calling on Ventura County and Caltrans to take immediate action by accelerating safety improvements, conducting an expedited safety study, and building protected northbound infrastructure that saves lives, specifically along the corridor near Solimar Beach, Faria Beach, Rincon, and Emma Wood State Beach. 

Every day without action puts more people at risk. It's time to Protect PCH.




# Our Mission 

### Why Safe Rec Ventura?

Ventura has thousands of recorded bike and pedestrian crashes, many of which are preventable. We believe every resident deserves to walk, roll, and ride safely.

Through community advocacy, data-driven education, and campaigns like Protect PCH, we amplify community voices and work to advance evidence-based infrastructure improvements that make our roads safer for everyone.

```{=html}
<div class="about-grid">
  <div class="about-card">
    <h3>🗺 Data-Driven Advocacy</h3>
    <p>We map real crash records from CHP to show exactly where and how crashes happen. By finding the high crash areas, we can turn our data into a call for action.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="about-card">
    <h3>📣 Community Voice</h3>
    <p>Your experience matters. We collect stories and observations from residents to complement official crash data and highlight gaps.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="about-card">
    <h3>🏛 Policy Change</h3>
    <p>Our website makes it simple for residents to connect directly with local decision makers by providing an email template to send to local representatives. </p>
  </div>
  <div class="about-card">
    <h3>🚶 Who We Serve</h3>
    <p>Cyclists, pedestrians, parents walking kids to school, seniors, and anyone who believes the streets should be safe for everyone — not just drivers.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Explore the Data

```{r}
#| label: home-map-preview
library(leaflet)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

crashes <- read_csv("data/Crashes.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(
    lat = coalesce(LATITUDE, POINT_Y),
    lon = coalesce(LONGITUDE, POINT_X)
  ) |>
  filter(
    !is.na(lat), !is.na(lon), lat != 0, lon != 0,
    lat >= 33.9, lat <= 34.9,
    lon >= -120.0, lon <= -118.55
  ) |>
  mutate(
    crash_type = case_when(
      BICYCLE_ACCIDENT == "Y" & PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT == "Y" ~ "Both",
      BICYCLE_ACCIDENT == "Y" ~ "Bike",
      PEDESTRIAN_ACCIDENT == "Y" ~ "Pedestrian",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    is_fatal = COLLISION_SEVERITY == 1,
    color = case_when(
      crash_type == "Bike"       ~ "#2563eb",
      crash_type == "Pedestrian" ~ "#d4622a",
      crash_type == "Both"       ~ "#7c3aed",
      TRUE                       ~ "#6b7280"
    ),
    label = paste0(
      "<b>", coalesce(PRIMARY_RD, "Unknown road"), "</b>",
      if_else(!is.na(SECONDARY_RD), paste0(" & ", SECONDARY_RD), ""),
      "<br><span style='color:#555'>", coalesce(CITY, ""), " · ", coalesce(as.character(COLLISION_DATE), ""), "</span>",
      "<br><span style='background:", color, ";color:#fff;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.8em'>",
      crash_type, "</span>"
    )
  )

star_icon <- makeIcon(
  iconUrl = paste0("data:image/svg+xml,", URLencode(
    '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="14" height="14"><polygon points="12,2 15.09,8.26 22,9.27 17,14.14 18.18,21.02 12,17.77 5.82,21.02 7,14.14 2,9.27 8.91,8.26" fill="#111827" stroke="#111827" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>',
    reserved = TRUE
  )),
  iconWidth = 14, iconHeight = 14,
  iconAnchorX = 7, iconAnchorY = 7
)

leaflet(crashes, width = "100%", height = "480px") |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = filter(crashes, !is_fatal),
    lng = ~lon, lat = ~lat,
    radius = 5,
    color = "#fff",
    weight = 1.2,
    fillColor = ~color,
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    popup = ~label,
    clusterOptions = markerClusterOptions(
      maxClusterRadius = 40,
      showCoverageOnHover = FALSE
    )
  ) |>
  addMarkers(
    data = filter(crashes, is_fatal),
    lng = ~lon, lat = ~lat,
    icon = star_icon,
    popup = ~label,
    clusterOptions = markerClusterOptions(
      maxClusterRadius = 40,
      showCoverageOnHover = FALSE
    )
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    colors  = c("#2563eb", "#d4622a", "#7c3aed", "#6b7280"),
    labels  = c("Bike", "Pedestrian", "Both", "Other"),
    title   = "Crash Type<br><small style='font-weight:normal'>&#9733; star = fatal</small>",
    opacity = 0.9
  )
```

[View the full interactive crash map →](map.html)

---

## Get Involved

Ready to help make Ventura safer? [Fill out our community interest form](get-involved.html) to let us know how you'd like to contribute — from advocacy to outreach to data collection.

[Want to speak up directly? Email a city decision maker →](take-action.html)
